languages.text: {n}Женщина почтительно складывает руки в аквилу. С ее протезом это смотрится слегка пугающе.{/n} "Бог-Император, спустя столько веков! Рубан Хрошовач, величайший герой 32-го полка, которого мы помним как Ушедшего! Он взошел на борт шаттла, найденного Первым Призывом, и отправился к звездам с просьбой о помощи. Он знал, что умрет в пустоте — лишь надеялся, что наш призыв будет услышан".

languages.text: {n}She reverently makes the sign of the Aquila — with her prosthetic, the sight leaves quite an impression.{/n} "God-Emperor, after so many centuries! Ruban Khroshovach, the 32nd Regiment's greatest hero, whom we remember as the Departed! He boarded the shuttle the First Call-Up had discovered and went to the stars with a plea for help. He knew he would die out there in the void — he only hoped that our plea would be heard."

Он знал, что умрет в пустоте — лишь надеялся, что наш призыв будет услышан".

{n}She reverently makes the sign of the Aquila — with her prosthetic, the sight leaves quite an impression.{/n} "God-Emperor, after so many centuries! Ruban Khroshovach, the 32nd Regiment's greatest hero, whom we remember as the Departed! He boarded the shuttle the First Call-Up had discovered and went to the stars with a plea for help. He knew he would die out there in the void — he only hoped that our plea would be heard."

"So it did work! Centuries later, by the God-Emperor — but still! Saint Ruban Khoroshkavich, the 32nd Regiment's greatest hero. Back when the First Call-Up found the abandoned shuttle, our hero went into the void with a recorded plea for help. He knew he would die out there — he only hoped that our plea would be heard."

languages.text: 「本当にうまくいったんだ！何世紀も後になって——神皇陛下にかけて、それでも！聖ルバン・ホロシュカヴィチ、第32連隊きっての英雄だ。第一召集が放棄されたシャトルを見つけたとき、我らの英雄は救援を求める録音を携えて虚空へと身を投じた。彼はそこで死ぬことを承知していた——ただ、我々の嘆願が届くことだけを願っていたのだ」
languages.original_text: "So it did work! Centuries later, by the God-Emperor — but still! Saint Ruban Khoroshkavich, the 32nd Regiment's greatest hero. Back when the First Call-Up found the abandoned shuttle, our hero went into the void with a recorded plea for help. He knew he would die out there — he only hoped that our plea would be heard."

traits.locale_text: 「本当にうまくいったんだ！何世紀も後になって——神皇陛下にかけて、それでも！聖ルバン・ホロシュカヴィチ、第32連隊きっての英雄だ。第一召集が放棄されたシャトルを見つけたとき、我らの英雄は救援を求める録音を携えて虚空へと身を投じた。彼はそこで死ぬことを承知していた——ただ、我々の嘆願が届くことだけを願っていたのだ。」

languages.text: {n}Elle fait le signe de l'Aquila avec révérence ; avec sa prothèse, la scène ne manque pas d'originalité.{/n} « Par l'Empereur-Dieu, après tant de siècles ! Ruban Khroshovach, le plus grand héros du 32e régiment, connu dans nos mémoires sous le nom des Disparus ! Il est monté à bord de la navette découverte par les Premiers Mobilisés et s'est envolé vers les étoiles pour transmettre un message de détresse. Il savait que c'était un voyage sans retour et espérait simplement que quelqu'un répondrait à notre appel. »
languages.original_text: {n}She reverently makes the sign of the Aquila — with her prosthetic, the sight leaves quite an impression.{/n} "God-Emperor, after so many centuries! Ruban Khroshovach, the 32nd Regiment's greatest hero, whom we remember as the Departed! He boarded the shuttle the First Call-Up had discovered and went to the stars with a plea for help. He knew he would die out there in the void — he only hoped that our plea would be heard."

traits.locale_text: {n}Elle fait le signe de l'Aquila avec révérence ; avec sa prothèse, la scène ne manque pas d'originalité.{/n} « Par l'Empereur-Dieu, après tant de siècles ! Ruban Khroshovach, le plus grand héros du 32e régiment, connu dans nos mémoires sous le nom des Disparus ! Il est monté à bord de la navette découverte par les Premiers Mobilisés et s'est envolé vers les étoiles pour transmettre un message de détresse. Il savait que c'était un voyage sans retour et espérait simplement que quelqu'un répondrait à notre appel. »

languages.text: {n}Huşu içinde Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor. Protezi de düşünüldüğünde etkileyici bir manzara oluşuyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator... Onca yüzyıldan sonra! Hatıramızda Göçen olarak yer eden 32. Alay'ın en büyük kahramanı Ruban Khroshovach! İlk Sevk Grubu'nun bulduğu mekiğe binip yardım çağrısıyla yıldızlara göçmüştü. Orada, hiçlikte öleceğini biliyordu. Yalnızca çağrımızın duyulmasını umuyordu."
languages.original_text: {n}She reverently makes the sign of the Aquila — with her prosthetic, the sight leaves quite an impression.{/n} "God-Emperor, after so many centuries! Ruban Khroshovach, the 32nd Regiment's greatest hero, whom we remember as the Departed! He boarded the shuttle the First Call-Up had discovered and went to the stars with a plea for help. He knew he would die out there in the void — he only hoped that our plea would be heard."

traits.locale_text: {n}Huşu içinde Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yapıyor. Protezi de düşünüldüğünde etkileyici bir manzara oluşuyor.{/n} "Tanrı İmparator... Onca yüzyıldan sonra! Hatıramızda Göçen olarak yer eden 32. Alay'ın en büyük kahramanı Ruban Khroshovach! İlk Sevk Grubu'nun bulduğu mekiğe binip yardım çağrısıyla yıldızlara göçmüştü. Orada, hiçlikte öleceğini biliyordu. Yalnızca çağrımızın duyulmasını umuyordu."

languages.text: {n}Sie macht ehrfürchtig das Zeichen des Adlers — was angesichts ihrer Prothese ein bemerkenswerter Anblick ist.{/n} "Gottimperator, nach so vielen Jahrhunderten! Ruban Khroshovach, der größte Held des 32. Regiments, der uns als 'der Abgereiste' in Erinnerung blieb. Er bestieg das Shuttle, das die Erste Einberufung entdeckt hatte, und flog zu den Sternen, um Hilfe zu erbitten. Er wusste, er könnte in der Leere sterben ... und hoffte nur, sein Notruf würde erhört."
languages.original_text: {n}She reverently makes the sign of the Aquila — with her prosthetic, the sight leaves quite an impression.{/n} "God-Emperor, after so many centuries! Ruban Khroshovach, the 32nd Regiment's greatest hero, whom we remember as the Departed! He boarded the shuttle the First Call-Up had discovered and went to the stars with a plea for help. He knew he would die out there in the void — he only hoped that our plea would be heard."

Ruban Khroshovach, der größte Held des 32. Regiments, der uns als 'der Abgereiste' in Erinnerung blieb. Er bestieg das Shuttle, das die Erste Einberufung entdeckt hatte, und flog zu den Sternen, um Hilfe zu erbitten. Er wusste, er könnte in der Leere sterben ... und hoffte nur, sein Notruf würde erhört."

languages.text: {n}Con reverencia, hace el signo del Aquila, que, con su prótesis, resulta impactante.{/n} «Oh, Dios Emperador, después de tantos siglos! ¡Ruban Khroshovach, el mayor héroe del 32.º regimiento, llamado el emisario! Subió a la lanzadera que habían descubierto los primeros llamados y partió hacia las estrellas en busca de ayuda. Sabía que moriría en el vacío, pero tenía la esperanza de que alguien oyera nuestra súplica».
languages.original_text: {n}She reverently makes the sign of the Aquila — with her prosthetic, the sight leaves quite an impression.{/n} "God-Emperor, after so many centuries! Ruban Khroshovach, the 32nd Regiment's greatest hero, whom we remember as the Departed! He boarded the shuttle the First Call-Up had discovered and went to the stars with a plea for help. He knew he would die out there in the void — he only hoped that our plea would be heard."

traits.locale_text: {n}Con reverencia, hace el signo del Aquila, que, con su prótesis, resulta impactante.{/n} «Oh, Dios Emperador, después de tantos siglos! ¡Ruban Khroshovach, el mayor héroe del 32.º regimiento, llamado el emisario! Subió a la lanzadera que habían descubierto los primeros llamados y partió hacia las estrellas en busca de ayuda. Sabía que moriría en el vacío, pero tenía la esperanza de que alguien oyera nuestra súplica».

languages.text: {n}她虔诚地做出双头鹰手势——用义体完成这一动作，看起来格外震撼。{/n}“神皇在上，都过去多少个世纪了！鲁班·霍罗什维奇，第32团最伟大的英雄，我们至今仍追念他为‘远行者’！他登上了初代征召者发现的那艘穿梭机，身负着求援的希望前往群星。他知道自己会死在虚空中，但他只盼有人能听到我们的呼救。”
languages.original_text: {n}She reverently makes the sign of the Aquila — with her prosthetic, the sight leaves quite an impression.{/n} "God-Emperor, after so many centuries! Ruban Khroshovach, the 32nd Regiment's greatest hero, whom we remember as the Departed! He boarded the shuttle the First Call-Up had discovered and went to the stars with a plea for help. He knew he would die out there in the void — he only hoped that our plea would be heard."

traits.locale_text: {n}她虔诚地做出双头鹰手势——用义体完成这一动作，看起来格外震撼。{/n}“神皇在上，都过去多少个世纪了！鲁班·霍罗什维奇，第32团最伟大的英雄，我们至今仍追念他为‘远行者’！他登上了初代征召者发现的那艘穿梭机，身负着求援的希望前往群星。他知道自己会死在虚空中，但他只盼有人能听到我们的呼救。”
